name: declarative-ai
description: Declarative AI: one execution seam over a typed operation model — LLM calls, hierarchical workflows, and delegated agents, with validation, retry, rate limiting, metering, and a normalized event stream.

scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p packages/json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/ops && tsc --noEmit -p packages/exec && tsc --noEmit -p packages/validate && tsc --noEmit -p packages/permissions && tsc --noEmit -p packages/llm && tsc --noEmit -p packages/promptop && tsc --noEmit -p packages/tools && tsc --noEmit -p packages/hw && tsc --noEmit -p packages/agents-api && tsc --noEmit -p packages/agents-cli
